obligation.goal:
iff (eq n_odd (Init.Nat.add (Init.Nat.mul 2 n) 1))
  (and (eq n (Nat.div (Init.Nat.sub n_odd 1) 2))
     (and (eq (Nat.modulo n_odd 2) 1) (gt n_odd 0)))

goals.goal:
forall _ : eq n_odd (Init.Nat.add (Init.Nat.mul 2 n) 1),
and (eq n (Nat.div (Init.Nat.sub n_odd 1) 2))
  (and (eq (Nat.modulo n_odd 2) 1) (gt n_odd 0))

forall
  _ : and (eq n (Nat.div (Init.Nat.sub n_odd 1) 2))
        (and (eq (Nat.modulo n_odd 2) 1) (gt n_odd 0)),
eq n_odd (Init.Nat.add (Init.Nat.mul 2 n) 1)

attempts:
constructor.
- intro H. exact (let H' := proj1 (div_mod_inv n_odd 2 n 1 (Nat.neq_succ_0 1)) (conj H (Nat.lt_succ_self 1)) in
         conj (proj1 H') (conj (eq_sym (proj1 (proj2 H'))) (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_0_succ 0) (proj2 (proj2 H'))))).
- intro H. exact (let (Hn, Hrest) := H in let (Hmod, Hgt) := Hrest in proj1 (proj2 (div_mod_inv n_odd 2 n 1 (Nat.neq_succ_0 1)) (conj Hn (conj (eq_sym Hmod) (Nat.succ_le_of_lt Hgt))))).

split.
- refine (fun (H : n_odd = 2*n+1) => 
    eq_ind_r (fun x => n = (x-1)/2 /\ x mod 2 = 1 /\ x > 0) 
      (conj (Nat.div_unique (2*n+1-1) 2 n 0 
         (eq_trans (eq_trans (f_equal (fun x => x - 1) (Nat.add_comm (2*n) 1)) (Nat.add_sub_cancel 1 (2*n))) (eq_sym (Nat.add_0_r (2*n)))) 
         (Nat.lt_0_succ 1)) 
        (conj (Nat.mod_unique (2*n+1) 2 n 1 (eq_refl _) (Nat.lt_succ_diag_r 1)) 
              (Nat.lt_0_succ (2*n)))) H).
- refine (fun (H : and (eq n (Nat.div (Init.Nat.sub n_odd 1) 2)) (and (eq (Nat.modulo n_odd 2) 1) (gt n_odd 0))) => 
    match H with
    | conj Hn (conj Hmod Hpos) => 
      let q := Nat.div n_odd 2 in
      let Hdm := eq_trans (Nat.div_mod n_odd 2 (Nat.succ_neq_zero 1)) (f_equal (fun x => 2*q + x) Hmod) in
      let Hsub := eq_trans (f_equal (fun x => x - 1) Hdm) 
                          (eq_trans (f_equal (fun x => x - 1) (Nat.add_comm (2*q) 1)) 
                                    (Nat.add_sub_cancel 1 (2*q))) in
      let Hdiv_eq := Nat.div_unique (n_odd-1) 2 q 0 
                      (eq_trans Hsub (eq_sym (Nat.add_0_r (2*q)))) (Nat.lt_0_succ 1) in
      let Hn_div := eq_trans Hn Hdiv_eq in
      eq_trans Hdm (f_equal (fun x => 2*x+1) Hn_div)
    end).

split.
- intro H; subst n_odd; repeat split; [simpl; apply Nat.div2_double | apply (Nat.mod_unique (2*n+1) 2 n 1 (eq_refl _) (Nat.lt_succ_diag_r 1)) | apply Nat.lt_0_succ].
- intros [H1 [H2 H3]]; assert (Hmod0 : (n_odd-1) % 2 = 0) by (apply (Nat.even_spec (n_odd-1)); apply (Nat.odd_succ (n_odd-1)); rewrite (Nat.succ_pred_eq_of_pos H3); apply (Nat.odd_spec n_odd); exact H2); assert (Hdivmod : (n_odd-1) = 2*n) by (rewrite (Nat.div_add_mod (n_odd-1) 2); rewrite Hmod0; rewrite H1; auto); omega.

and (eq n (Nat.div (Init.Nat.sub n_odd 1) 2))
  (and (eq (Nat.modulo n_odd 2) 1) (gt n_odd 0))

intro H; subst n_odd; repeat split; [simpl; apply Nat.div2_double | apply (Nat.mod_unique (2*n+1) 2 n 1 (eq_refl _) (Nat.lt_succ_diag_r 1)) | apply Nat.lt_0_succ].

intro H. exact (let H' := proj1 (div_mod_inv n_odd 2 n 1 (Nat.neq_succ_0 1)) (conj H (Nat.lt_succ_self 1)) in
         conj (proj1 H') (conj (eq_sym (proj1 (proj2 H'))) (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_0_succ 0) (proj2 (proj2 H'))))).

    eq_ind_r (fun x => n = (x-1)/2 /\ x mod 2 = 1 /\ x > 0) 
      (conj (Nat.div_unique (2*n+1-1) 2 n 0

forall
  _ : and (eq n (Nat.div (Init.Nat.sub n_odd 1) 2))
        (and (eq (Nat.modulo n_odd 2) 1) (gt n_odd 0)),

forall _ : eq n_odd (Init.Nat.add (Init.Nat.mul 2 n) 1),
and (eq n (Nat.div (Init.Nat.sub n_odd 1) 2))
  (and (eq (Nat.modulo n_odd 2) 1) (gt n_odd 0))

forall
  _ : and (eq n (Nat.div (Init.Nat.sub n_odd 1) 2))
        (and (eq (Nat.modulo n_odd 2) 1) (gt n_odd 0)),

attempts: intro H. exact (let (Hn, Hrest) := H in let (Hmod, Hgt) := Hrest in proj1 (proj2 (div_mod_inv n_odd 2 n 1 (Nat.neq_succ_0 1)) (conj Hn (conj (eq_sym Hmod) (Nat.succ_le_of_lt Hgt))))).

refine (fun (H : and (eq n (Nat.div (Init.Nat.sub n_odd 1) 2)) (and (eq (Nat.modulo n_odd 2) 1) (gt n_odd 0))) => 
    match H with
    | conj Hn (conj Hmod Hpos) => 
      let q := Nat.div n_odd 2 in
      let Hdm := eq_trans (Nat.div_mod n_odd 2 (Nat.succ_neq_zero 1)) (f_equal (fun x => 2*q + x) Hmod) in
      let Hsub := eq_trans (f_equal (fun x => x - 1) Hdm) 
                          (eq_trans (f_equal (fun x => x - 1) (Nat.add_comm (2*q) 1)) 
                                    (Nat.add_sub_cancel 1 (2*q))) in
      let Hdiv_eq := Nat.div_unique (n_odd-1) 2 q 0 
                      (eq_trans Hsub (eq_sym (Nat.add_0_r (2*q)))) (Nat.lt_0_succ 1) in
      let Hn_div := eq_trans Hn Hdiv_eq in
      eq_trans Hdm (f_equal (fun x => 2*x+1) Hn_div)
    end).

intros [H1 [H2 H3]]; assert (Hmod0 : (n_odd-1) % 2 = 0) by (apply (Nat.even_spec (n_odd-1)); apply (Nat.odd_succ (n_odd-1)); rewrite (Nat.succ_pred_eq_of_pos H3); apply (Nat.odd_spec n_odd); exact H2); assert (Hdivmod : (n_odd-1) = 2*n) by (rewrite (Nat.div_add_mod (n_odd-1) 2); rewrite Hmod0; rewrite H1; auto); omega.

intros n_odd n H. destruct H as [H1 [H2 H3]]. pose proof (Nat.div_mod_eq n_odd 2) as Hdiv1. rewrite H2 in Hdiv1. assert (Hsub : n_odd - 1 = 2 * (n_odd / 2)) by (rewrite Hdiv1; rewrite Nat.add_sub_cancel; reflexivity). rewrite (Nat.div_unique (n_odd - 1) 2 (n_odd / 2) 0 Hsub (Nat.lt_0_succ 1)) in H1; rewrite H1 in Hdiv1; exact Hdiv1.
intros H. destruct H as [Hn_eq [Hmod Hgt]]. apply (proj2 (div_mod_inv n_odd 2 n 1 (Nat.succ_neq_0 1))). repeat split; auto with arith; (symmetry; auto with arith) || auto with arith.

intros n_odd n [h_eq [h_mod h_gt]]. pose proof (Nat.mod_add_div n_odd 2 (Nat.neq_succ_0 1)) as h_mod_div. rewrite h_mod in h_mod_div. rewrite plus_comm in h_mod_div. symmetry in h_mod_div. rewrite h_mod_div in h_eq. rewrite Nat.add_sub_cancel_right in h_eq. rewrite (Nat.div_eq_of_eq_mul_right (2*(Nat.div n_odd 2)) 2 (Nat.div n_odd 2) (Nat.lt_0_succ 1) (eq_refl _)) in h_eq. rewrite h_eq in h_mod_div. exact h_mod_div.

intros H. destruct H as [Hn_eq [Hmod Hgt]]. pose proof (Nat.div_mod_eq n_odd 2) as Hdm. rewrite Hmod in Hdm. assert (Hsub : Nat.sub n_odd 1 = 2 * (Nat.div n_odd 2)) by (rewrite Hdm, Nat.add_sub_cancel; reflexivity). rewrite Hsub in Hn_eq. rewrite (Nat.mul_div_cancel 2 (Nat.div n_odd 2) Nat.lt_0_2) in Hn_eq. rewrite Hn_eq in Hdm. exact Hdm.
intro H; destruct H as [H1 [H2 H3]]; apply (proj1 (proj2 (div_mod_inv n_odd 2 n 1 (Nat.neq_succ_0 1))) (conj H1 (conj H2 (Nat.succ_le_of_lt H3)))).
intros n_odd n [H1 [H2_mod H2_gt]]. apply (proj2 (div_mod_inv n_odd 2 n 1 (Nat.succ_neq_0 1))). repeat split; [exact H1 | apply (eq_sym H2_mod) | apply (Nat.succ_le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_gt H2_gt))].

intros n_odd n H. destruct H as [Hdiv [Hmod Hgt]]. assert (Hda : n_odd = 2 * (Nat.div n_odd 2) + 1) by
  (apply (Nat.div_add_mod n_odd 2); discriminate). replace (Nat.sub n_odd 1) with (2 * (Nat.div n_odd 2)) in Hdiv by
  (rewrite Hda; rewrite Nat.add_sub_cancel; reflexivity). rewrite (Nat.mul_div_cancel_l (Nat.div n_odd 2) 2) in Hdiv; [|discriminate]. rewrite Hdiv in Hda. exact Hda.

intros n_odd n H. destruct H as [H1 [H2 H3]]. assert (H4 := Nat.div_add_mod n_odd 2); rewrite H2 in H4. assert (H6: Nat.div (n_odd - 1) 2 = Nat.div n_odd 2) by (apply (Nat.div_unique (n_odd - 1) 2 (Nat.div n_odd 2) 0); [rewrite H4; rewrite Nat.add_sub_cancel; rewrite Nat.add_0_r; reflexivity | repeat constructor]). rewrite H6 in H1; rewrite H1 in H4; exact H4.
failed_attempts: intro H. exact (let (Hn, Hrest) := H in let (Hmod, Hgt) := Hrest in proj1 (proj2 (div_mod_inv n_odd 2 n 1 (Nat.neq_succ_0 1)) (conj Hn (conj (eq_sym Hmod) (Nat.succ_le_of_lt Hgt))))).

refine (fun (H : and (eq n (Nat.div (Init.Nat.sub n_odd 1) 2)) (and (eq (Nat.modulo n_odd 2) 1) (gt n_odd 0))) => 
    match H with
    | conj Hn (conj Hmod Hpos) => 
      let q := Nat.div n_odd 2 in
      let Hdm := eq_trans (Nat.div_mod n_odd 2 (Nat.succ_neq_zero 1)) (f_equal (fun x => 2*q + x) Hmod) in
      let Hsub := eq_trans (f_equal (fun x => x - 1) Hdm) 
                          (eq_trans (f_equal (fun x => x - 1) (Nat.add_comm (2*q) 1)) 
                                    (Nat.add_sub_cancel 1 (2*q))) in
      let Hdiv_eq := Nat.div_unique (n_odd-1) 2 q 0 
                      (eq_trans Hsub (eq_sym (Nat.add_0_r (2*q)))) (Nat.lt_0_succ 1) in
      let Hn_div := eq_trans Hn Hdiv_eq in
      eq_trans Hdm (f_equal (fun x => 2*x+1) Hn_div)
    end).

intros [H1 [H2 H3]]; assert (Hmod0 : (n_odd-1) % 2 = 0) by (apply (Nat.even_spec (n_odd-1)); apply (Nat.odd_succ (n_odd-1)); rewrite (Nat.succ_pred_eq_of_pos H3); apply (Nat.odd_spec n_odd); exact H2); assert (Hdivmod : (n_odd-1) = 2*n) by (rewrite (Nat.div_add_mod (n_odd-1) 2); rewrite Hmod0; rewrite H1; auto); omega.
